sql_array: CREATE TABLE drivers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO drivers (id, name) VALUES (1, 'OpenLink Generic 32 Bit Driver v4.0');
INSERT INTO drivers (id, name) VALUES (2, 'Sample Driver');
SELECT sql_get_installed_drivers() AS driver_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drivers) % 2 AS driver_count_mod;
SELECT name, (id % 2) AS odd_even_flag FROM drivers WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT d.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) % 3 FROM drivers d2 WHERE d2.id < d.id) AS mod_count FROM drivers d;
SELECT d.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drivers d2 WHERE d2.id = d.id) AS self_count FROM drivers d WHERE d.name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT name FROM drivers WHERE LENGTH(name) > (SELECT MAX(id % 3) FROM drivers);
SELECT A.name, (SELECT sql_get_installed_drivers() WHERE A.id = 1) AS driver_info FROM drivers A HAVING (A.id IS NULL OR A.id % 5 = 0);
SELECT d.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drivers) % 2 AS even_drivers FROM drivers d GROUP BY d.name HAVING (COUNT(d.id) >= 1);
